theme: Plumbing a maze from fixed-length pipe sticks
title: Pipe Maze: Stick-Congruent Routing
strategies: naive wall-hugging walk toward the target with fixed direction priority and DFS backtracking (ignores stock sticks entirely)
plain BFS shortest path from A to B (minimizes raw geometric length only, oblivious to stick length L / bend allowance a / weld cost W -- scatters bends wherever the maze forces them)

augmented-state shortest path over (cell, incoming direction, remaining capacity of the current stick), fusing routing with the optimal stick-partition DP, allowing voluntary early welds to set up clean full-length sticks -- finds the route that is jointly optimal for path shape AND stick partition, even when that route is geometrically longer than the shortest path
